prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Hey Gina! What's up? How's the store going? I gotta tell you about this thing with my biz."
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Hey Jon! The store's doing great! It's a wild ride. How's the biz?"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Hey Gina! I'm putting in a lot of work on my business even with the obstacles. I'm gonna make it happen!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Wow! You've got drive! Keep it up and you'll definitely make a splash."
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks Gina! Your help really means a lot. Sometimes it's hard when things don't go my way, but I'm sure if I keep pushing, I'll reach my dreams!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Understand where you're at, Jon. Setbacks are just opportunities for comebacks. You got the skills, passion, and drive. Plus my full support. Don't give up, buddy!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks! Setbacks can be tough, but with your support, I can handle anything. Appreciate you having my back!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "I'm here for you no matter what! Anything you want to say about your biz?"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Searching for a dance studio location has been tricky, but I'm determined to find the right spot - when I do, I'm sure the rest will follow!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Searching for the perfect dance studio's a tough job, Jon. Hang in there and you'll find it soon!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks! Appreciate your encouragement - it means a lot! I'm working on my business and some new dance routines - rehearsing hard for an upcoming show. I'm passionate about dancing and it brings me so much joy and fulfillment."
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Wow, Jon! You're so talented! What show ya got planned?"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "I'm getting ready for a dance comp near me next month. It's a great chance for me to show my skillz and, hopefully, get some props from the dance fam. Super stoked!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Wow Jon, you're gonna kill it in that competition. Your hard work and talent will pay off! Good luck."
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks! Your help means a lot. I'll do my best to make you proud!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "No doubt, Jon you've got this. Your passion and commitment are awesome! Keep it up!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks! I'm going for my dreams!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Gina said: "Absolutely Jon. I'm always here to cheer you on. Make your dreams happen - keep going and believe in yourself. You got this!"
[10:43 am on 4 February, 2023] Jon said: "Thanks, Gina! Your kind words mean a lot. I won't give up!""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
